entry.data:
RAIN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS EVENING
BREEZY AND MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 20S
WEST WINDS 15 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 45 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SNOW SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY IN THE AFTERNOON
BLUSTERY AND MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 20 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH
CHANCE OF SNOW 20 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS AROUND 17
NORTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH IN THE EVENING

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING WEST IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 30
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS AROUND 60
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS AROUND 70
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
